# StudyLah

> StudyLah (www.studylah.education) is an independent Singapore publisher of
> exam preparation for the Singapore-Cambridge O-Level (G3) and N(A)-Level
> (G2), 2026 sitting. For each subject it sells a data-driven Exam Forecast
> (every syllabus topic ranked into VERY HIGH / HIGH / MODERATE / WATCH
> confidence tiers, built from ten years of past papers), a subject-specific
> companion, original practice questions (Sure Questions Vault), and a full
> timed rehearsal paper with mark scheme. Every purchase also unlocks Study
> HQ — a study dashboard with daily retrieval practice, a self-maintaining
> mistake notebook, a Marks-at-Risk meter, subject skill drills, exam timers,
> a printable rescue plan, and an opt-in weekly parent progress email.
> Forecasts are probabilistic predictions, not leaked or actual exam content;
> accuracy scorecards with hits AND misses are published after every sitting,
> and purchases carry a conditional money-back guarantee. StudyLah is not
> affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to SEAB, MOE, or Cambridge
> (UCLES).

Key facts:
- Coverage: 14 O-Level subjects and 8 N(A)-Level subjects (sciences, maths,
  humanities, POA, Nutrition & Food Science).
- Pricing (SGD): per-subject tiers Essential / Strategic / Master; multi-
  subject Mega-Bundle (3+) and All-In (5-6) discounts; S$15/S$15 refer-a-
  friend programme.
- Delivery: instant PDF download, watermarked to the buyer, plus Study HQ
  access (daily practice, mistake notebook, study planner, timers).
- Free tools: "Predict your mark" — a 10-question auto-marked readiness check
  per subject with an indicative (never promised) grade band — and a free
  sample heatmap.
- Payments: PayNow, cards, Alipay, WeChat Pay (via Stripe).

Important pages:
- [Home](https://www.studylah.education/)
- [How it works / sales page](https://www.studylah.education/exam-forecast)
- [O-Level subjects](https://www.studylah.education/o-level)
- [N(A)-Level subjects](https://www.studylah.education/na-level)
- [Accuracy scorecard — published hits and misses](https://www.studylah.education/accuracy)
- [Predict your mark — free readiness check](https://www.studylah.education/diagnostic)
- [Blog — methodology and study science](https://www.studylah.education/blog)
- [FAQ and money-back guarantee](https://www.studylah.education/faq)
- [Free sample heatmap](https://www.studylah.education/free-heatmap)

Contact: hello@studylah.education
